member.name: T:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis
member.summary: An extension for StackExchange.Redis for configuring connections to Azure Cache for Redis resources.

member.name: P:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis.ConfigureForAzure
member.summary: Configures a Redis connection authenticated with an access key.

member.name: M:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis.ConfigureForAzureWithSystemAssignedManagedIdentityAsync(StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Configures a Redis connection authenticated using a system-assigned managed identity. Throws on failure by default (configurable in the method).
member.param: The configuration to update.
Principal (object) ID of the client resource's system-assigned managed identity.
member.exception: When the token source is not supported or identified incorrectly.
Unable to contact the identity service to acquire a token.

member.name: M:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis.ConfigureForAzureWithUserAssignedManagedIdentityAsync(StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configures a Redis connection authenticated using a user-assigned managed identity. Throws on failure by default (configurable in the method).
member.param: The configuration to update.
Client ID or resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
Principal (object) ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
member.exception: When the token source is not supported or identified incorrectly.
Unable to contact the identity service to acquire a token.

member.summary: Configures a Redis connection authenticated using a service principal. NOTE: Service principal authentication should only be used in scenarios where managed identity CANNOT be used. Throws on failure by default (configurable in the method).
member.param: The configuration to update.
Client ID of the service principal.
Principal (object) ID of the service principal.
Tenant ID of the service principal.
Service principal secret. Either or must be provided
Service principal certificate. Either or must be provided.
Optional. Provide a value to use an Azure cloud other than the Public cloud.
Optional. Provide a value to use an Azure cloud not included in . URI format will be similar to https://login.microsoftonline.com)
member.exception: When the token source is not supported or identified incorrectly.
Unable to contact the identity service to acquire a token.

member.name: M:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis.ConfigureForAzureWithTokenCredentialAsync(StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions,System.String,Azure.Core.TokenCredential)
member.summary: Configures a Redis connection authenticated using a TokenCredential.
member.param: The configuration to update.
The user to be used for authentication.
The TokenCredential to be used.

member.name: M:StackExchange.Redis.AzureCacheForRedis.ConfigureForAzureAsync(StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions,Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions)
member.summary: Configures a connection to an Azure Cache for Redis using advanced options.
member.param: The configuration to update.
Options for configuring a connection to an Azure Cache for Redis.
member.exception: When the token source is not supported or identified incorrectly.
Unable to contact the identity service to acquire a token.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring connections to Azure Cache for Redis.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.PrincipalId
member.summary: Principal (object) ID of a managed identity or a service principal used to authenticate a connection to Redis. Required when connecting with a managed identity or service principal.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ClientId
member.summary: Client ID of a managed identity or a service principal used to authenticate a connection to Redis. Required when connecting with a user-assigned managed identity or a service principal.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ServicePrincipalTenantId
member.summary: Tenant ID of a service principal used to authenticate a connection to Redis.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ServicePrincipalSecret
member.summary: Service principal secret used to authenticate a connection to Redis.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ServicePrincipalCertificate
member.summary: Service principal certificate used to authenticate a connection to Redis.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.Cloud
member.summary: Azure cloud where the application is running. Defaults to the Public cloud. To use a sovereign cloud, set to the appropriate

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.CloudUri
member.summary: URI for the Azure cloud where the application is running. Use this for clouds not included in

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.TokenCredential
member.summary: TokenCredential used to authenticate a connection to Redis.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ThrowOnTokenRefreshFailure
member.summary: Whether or not to throw an exception on failure to refresh an expiring Microsoft Entra ID token.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.ShouldTokenBeRefreshed
member.summary: Determines whether the current token should be refreshed, based on its age and lifespan

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.TokenHeartbeatInterval
member.summary: Periodic interval to check token for expiration, acquire new tokens, and re-authenticate connections.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.MaxTokenRefreshAttempts
member.summary: Number of attempts to acquire a new token. If none of the attempts succeed, the same number of attempts will be made at the next timer interval.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions.TokenRefreshBackoff
member.summary: Determines the interval between attempts to acquire a new token. The function receives an integer indicating how many attempts have been made and the exception necessitating a retry. It returns a TimeSpan that determines the interval to wait before the next attempt. By default, wait a number of seconds corresponding to the number of attempts completed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProvider
member.summary: Redis connection configuration options provider for use with Azure Cache for Redis.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProvider.AbortOnConnectFail
member.summary: Default to false to continue attempting to connect after an initial failure. This provides more resilience in cloud application environments.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProvider.LibraryName
member.summary: The identifier used to mark connections being managed by this extension package.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken
member.summary: Redis connection configuration options provider for using Microsoft Entra ID authentication with Azure Cache for Redis.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken.GetIdentityClient(Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptions)
member.summary: Instantiates a configured for a specific authentication type, depending on the properties supplied in
member.param: Options including details of the managed identity or service principal used for authentication

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken.GetDefaultSsl(StackExchange.Redis.EndPointCollection)
member.summary: Require SSL on all connections using Microsoft Entra ID tokens for authentication.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken.AfterConnectAsync(StackExchange.Redis.ConnectionMultiplexer,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Initialize new Redis connections managed by this instance of the extension. Each StackExchange.Redis.ConnectionMultiplexer instance using these options will call this method when it first connects to Redis
member.param: The multiplexer that just connected.
The logger for the connection, to emit to the connection output log.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken.AcquireTokenAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Acquires a token to authenticate connections to Azure Cache for Redis
member.param: to throw on failure, to suppress handle exceptions and retry

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.AzureCacheOptionsProviderWithToken.ReauthenticateConnectionsAsync
member.summary: Re-authenticate all connections with the current token.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.ICacheIdentityClient
member.summary: Acquires tokens from Microsoft Entra ID for authenticating connections to Azure Cache for Redis.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.ICacheIdentityClient.GetTokenAsync
member.summary: Acquire a token to be used to authenticate a connection.
member.returns: A TokenResult containing a token and expiration

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.IAzureCacheTokenEvents
member.summary: Events raised to notify Redis client applications about authentication token management operations.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.IAzureCacheTokenEvents.TokenRefreshed
member.summary: Raised when an authentication token is refreshed. The TokenResult argument passed to handler contains the token and its expiry.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.IAzureCacheTokenEvents.TokenRefreshFailed
member.summary: Raised when an attempt to refresh an authentication token fails.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.IAzureCacheTokenEvents.ConnectionReauthenticated
member.summary: Raised when a Redis connection is re-authenticated. The string argument passed to subscribers identifies the server endpoint that was re-authenticated.

member.name: E:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.IAzureCacheTokenEvents.ConnectionReauthenticationFailed
member.summary: Raised when an attempt to re-authenticate a Redis connection fails.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenRefreshFailedEventArgs
member.summary: Contains information about a token refresh failure.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenRefreshFailedEventArgs.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception if available (this can be null).

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenRefreshFailedEventArgs.Expiry
member.summary: When token expires.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.ConnectionReauthenticationFailedEventArgs
member.summary: Contains information about a failure to re-authenticate a Redis server connection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.ConnectionReauthenticationFailedEventArgs.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception if available (this can be null).

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.ConnectionReauthenticationFailedEventArgs.Endpoint
member.summary: Server endpoint that failed to re-authenticate.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenResult
member.summary: Result from getting a new token for authentication

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenResult.Token
member.summary: Token to be used for authentication.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenResult.ExpiresOn
member.summary: Expiry for the acquired token.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenResult.#ctor(Microsoft.Identity.Client.AuthenticationResult)
member.summary: Creates a TokenResult from an AuthenticationResult.
member.param: An AuthenticationResult from getting a token through the Microsoft Identity Client.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Azure.StackExchangeRedis.TokenResult.#ctor(Azure.Core.AccessToken)
member.summary: Creates a TokenResult from an AccessToken.
member.param: An AccessToken from a TokenCredential.
